cases.title: Prefix matches column: suggest unqualified column
cases.sql: SELECT * FROM users u WHERE n|

expected.comment: Prefix 'n' matches column 'name'. Suggest unqualified column.

cases.title: Prefix matches alias: trigger alias disambiguation
cases.sql: SELECT * FROM users u WHERE u|

expected.comment: Prefix 'u' exactly matches alias 'u'. Trigger alias disambiguation.
Prefix 'o' exactly matches alias 'o'. Trigger alias disambiguation.

cases.title: ORDER BY: Prefix matches column
cases.sql: SELECT * FROM products p ORDER BY pr|

expected.comment: Prefix 'pr' matches columns 'price'. Suggest unqualified column.

cases.title: JOIN ON: Prefix matches alias
cases.sql: SELECT * FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON c|

expected.comment: Prefix 'c' exactly matches alias 'c'. Trigger alias disambiguation.

cases.title: GROUP BY: Prefix matches column
cases.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM items i GROUP BY item|

expected.comment: Prefix 'item' matches column 'item_name'. Suggest unqualified column.

cases.title: WHERE: Prefix does not match alias or any column - no suggestions
cases.sql: SELECT * FROM users u WHERE us|

expected.comment: Prefix 'us' does not match alias 'u' or any column. Table is aliased, cannot use original name. No suggestions.

cases.title: SELECT: Prefix does not match alias or any column - no suggestions

expected.comment: Prefix 'ord' does not match alias 'o' or any column. Table is aliased, cannot use original name. No suggestions.

cases.title: ORDER BY: Prefix does not match alias or any column - no suggestions
cases.sql: SELECT * FROM products p ORDER BY prod|

expected.comment: Prefix 'prod' does not match alias 'p' or any column. Table is aliased, cannot use original name. No suggestions.

cases.title: JOIN ON: Prefix does not match any alias or column - no suggestions
cases.sql: SELECT * FROM customers c JOIN orders o ON cust|

expected.comment: Prefix 'cust' does not match alias 'c' or 'o', or any column. Tables are aliased, cannot use original names. No suggestions.

cases.title: GROUP BY: Prefix does not match alias or any column - no suggestions
cases.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM items i GROUP BY ite|

expected.comment: Prefix 'ite' does not match alias 'i' or any column. Table is aliased, cannot use original name. No suggestions.

cases.title: HAVING: Prefix does not match alias or any column - no suggestions
cases.sql: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM customers c GROUP BY c.name HAVING cust|

expected.comment: Prefix 'cust' does not match alias 'c' or any column. Table is aliased, cannot use original name. No suggestions.
